title: Pancake Breakfast Fly-In
description: Fire up the griddle and roll out the red carpet — the ramp is open, the pancakes are hot, and everyone's welcome. Fly in, drive in, or just wander over from your hangar.

title: Coffee & Donuts
description: The classic 18V tradition. Show up, grab a coffee, swap a story on the ramp. No agenda. Just community.
